title: anthemis cretica var. hinkovae
intro: Anthemis cretica var. hinkovae, also known as Hinkov's Chamomile or Lesser Chamomile, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is closely related to the common chamomile (Anthemis cretica). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica var. hinkovae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
